description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen on the front. The display shows a typical iOS home screen with app icons, a status bar, and a subtle dark-themed wallpaper. The back is matte black with a prominent silver Apple logo centered and a triple-lens camera array with flash in the top left corner. The sides are thin and metallic, with visible buttons and a slight camera bump on the rear. The device is compact, lightweight, and designed for handheld use, with a premium finish and minimalistic design. No external case or cover is present, and all features are integrated into the phone's body.
description: A sleek, black modern smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, triple rear cameras, and a centered Apple logo. The device has a premium, minimalistic design with metallic sides and no external case.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass touchscreen with app icons, status bar, and a dark wallpaper.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the phone's slim metallic edge and the slight protrusion of the rear camera bump.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the matte black finish, centered Apple logo, and triple camera array with flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the slim edge and a visible button, likely the power or volume control.
attribute_brand_logo: Silver Apple logo centered on the back of the device.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays an iOS home screen with app icons, a status bar showing time and signal, and a dark-themed wallpaper.
attribute_camera_placement: Triple camera array with flash located in the top left corner on the back, arranged in a square module.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the sides, including a likely power button and volume controls on the right and left edges.
